selection.eligible_population: rows with a non-empty trajectory and submission, excluding django__django-15044.traj
selection.selection_rule: Sort eligible trajectory filenames lexicographically, hash the UTF-8 string 'Project-FAR-trace-candidate-002', interpret the first eight hexadecimal digits as an unsigned integer, and select index modulo eligible-row count.

decision_rules.primary_result: pre-outcome FAR adjudication status and registered claim resolutions
decision_rules.secondary_result: agreement or disagreement with outcome revealed only after the primary result is hash-frozen

claim_boundary: Candidate 002 may test blind operational detection value only if selection, acquisition, compilation, adjudication, and primary-result hashing occur before any forbidden outcome field is inspected.
